name: Tuna and Olive Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 1/2 oz Canned Tuna, in water, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to directions. Rinse in cold water and drain well.
2. Place macaroni, olives, tuna and parsley in a large bowl and toss well.
3. Put the remaining ingredients in a jar and shake well.
4. Pour dressing over pasta and gently mix to coat all ingredients.
5. Refrigerate for 2 hours before serving.
